caption: Role Management
description: Role Management events report lifecycle management of a role, as well as privileges assigned or removed from a role and the resources associated with the role. There are two ways updates to the state of a role may be expressed: Using the Update activity, the updated_role reflects the changes made to iam_role. Using discrete activities, such as Assign Privileges the desired state change is expressed by the privileges attribute.
name: role_management

1.caption: Create
1.description: Create a role. Use iam_role as the role to be created.

2.caption: Update
2.description: Update a role. The updated role details should be populated in the updated_role attribute.

3.caption: Delete
3.description: Delete a role. Use iam_role as the role to be deleted.

4.caption: Assign Privileges
4.description: Assign privileges to a role. Use privileges to be assigned to iam_role. Optionally, on success, the updated_role reflects the new state of the role.

5.caption: Remove Privileges
5.description: Remove privileges from a role. Use privileges to be removed from iam_role.

6.caption: Assign Resources
6.description: Assign resources to a role. Use resource to be assigned to iam_role.

7.caption: Remove Resources
7.description: Remove resources from a role. Use resource to be removed from iam_role.

8.caption: Assign Policy
8.description: Assign privileges to a role. Use privileges to be assigned to iam_role.

9.caption: Remove Policy
9.description: Remove privileges from a role. Use privileges to be removed from iam_role.

10.caption: Programmatic Credentials
10.description: Assign resources to a role. Use resource to be assigned to iam_role.

11.caption: Remove Resources
11.description: Remove resources from a role. Use resource to be removed from iam_role.

privileges.description: A list of privileges assigned to or removed from iam_role.

updated_role.description:
The result of an updated role.

When the update is successful, this is the newly updated role. Upon failure, represents the attempted state of the role.
